name: @ganaweb/db
description: GanaWeb persistence layer. Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL 17 (online-first). Implements ports declared by aplicacion.

scripts.build: find src -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && tsc --noEmit || echo 'PR1 stub: no source files yet'
scripts.typecheck: find src -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && tsc --noEmit || echo 'PR1 stub: no source files yet'
scripts.test: echo "@ganaweb/db: no tests in PR1 stub"
